title: Device Type
text: Device Type Name of the device translation table to use for this print job model. The device table specified must be compatible with the physical printing device to be used. By convention print job model names start with P_ . Print job models named P_ XXX X (such as P_MSWINX ) use enhanced printing features. Table 1. Commonly Used Device Translation Tables Device Translation Table Description P_MSWINX Uses the Microsoft print API to print through the print manager. Prints widgets with proportional fonts and with representation instead of value; respects widget properties. If selected, Print Queue must be set to PRINTMAN . P_MSWIN3 Uses the Microsoft print API to print through print manager. Does not support widget printing. If selected, Print Queue must be set to PRINTMAN . P_DEFAULT Sends ASCII-only characters to printer. Line feed and form feed are the only control characters sent to the printer. P_LASERJET2 Sends HP PCL control characters to printer. P_X11 Sends extended Postscript commands to printer. Related Links Device Translation Tables for Printing Printer device tables are a collection of sequences (control codes) associated with specific logical functions (such as bold, form feed, and init). The sequences begin with the escape character and are referred to as escape sequences. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
